content.name: Protect Sector
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description:
This extension allows you to protect a sector from being harassed by hostile ships. This is useful when you want to prevent hostile ships to attack your ships and stations. Or when you want to prevent from building in a sector.
[h2][b]Compatibility[/b][/h2]
Compatible with [b]X4: Foundations 7.50[/b] and upper.
[h2][b]Features[/b][/h2] [list] [*] Always the closest possible target will be selected to attack. [*] Several ships/fleets with one order can work in one sector or crossed sectors. [*] [b]Mimic[/b] order in a fleet is fully supported. But, again, not set single ship to mimic mode - use the fleet instead. [*] The [b]Lost Ship Replacement[/b] feature is fully supported. [*] The own ([b]Experimental[/b]) order for station attacks is available. [*] The workaround for player ships repairing/restocking not only in current sector is implemented based on received damage sensitivity levels. [/list] [h2][b]Download[/b][/h2]
You can download the latest version via Steam client - [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3379427822]Protect Sector[/url] Or you can do it via the [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/1566]Nexus Mods[/url]
[h2][b]Usage Guide[/b][/h2]
[h3][b][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3692496162]Protect Sector[/url][/b][/h3]
[h2][b]Special Thanks[/b][/h2]
Special thanks to the pilot [url=https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198087933619/myworkshopfiles/?appid=392160]Assailer[/url] for his awesome script [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2458720435]"Sector Patrol"[/url] which was used as a base for this one.
[h2][b]Links[/b][/h2] [list] [*] There is a thread on EgoSoft forum - [url=https://forum.egosoft.com/viewtopic.php?p=5257237][Mod/AIScript] Order "Protect Sector"[/url] [*] Mod Support APIs: [list] [*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2042901274]SirNukes Mod Support APIs on Steam[/url] [*] [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/503]Mod Support APIs on Nexus Mods[/url] [/list] [*] My other mods and tools: [list] [*] [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/chemodun/myworkshopfiles/?appid=392160]On Steam[/url] [*] [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/profile/ChemODun/mods?gameId=2659]On Nexus Mods[/url] [/list] [/list]

text.name: Protéger le Secteur
text.description: Protéger le Secteur contre les vaisseaux hostiles

text.name: Proteger el Sector
text.description: Proteger el Sector contra naves hostiles

text.name: 保護セクター
text.description: 敵対的な船からセクターを保護します

text.name: 保护区域
text.description: 保护区域免受敌对船只的侵害

text.name: 保護區域
text.description: 保護區域免受敵對船隻的侵害
